scripts.dev:db: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml up -d postgres redis
scripts.dev:workers: concurrently -k -n upload,document,knowledge,analysis,docgen,pi-user,pi-internal -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,gray,white "pnpm --filter @legalai/upload-worker dev" "pnpm --filter @legalai/document-worker dev" "pnpm --filter @legalai/knowledge-worker dev" "pnpm --filter @legalai/analysis-worker dev" "pnpm --filter @legalai/docgen-worker dev" "pnpm --filter @legalai/pi-user dev" "pnpm --filter @legalai/pi-internal dev"
